findings.title: control_loop_boundary gate can pass even if clear-loop-lease cleanup fails
findings.rationale: The flow executes clear_parent_loop_lease, but gate success criteria only check no_lease_yielded/subagent_yielded/lease_active/active_parent_blocked/lease_paused/paused_parent_yielded. If clear-loop-lease fails, the gate still returns pass, so cleanup integrity can regress without failing qualification.
findings.suggested_next_action: Track clear_parent_loop_lease success in a dedicated check and require it in the pass predicate; add a regression test asserting control_loop_boundary fails when clear-loop-lease fails.
